explanations.taskpack_percent: Taskpack defined the action-runner scope, required enums, evidence gates, and closure format.
explanations.repo_existing_foundation_percent: Existing Sanctum NG transfer console/server/registry/UI foundations were extended rather than replaced.
explanations.pdf_plan_percent: Read-required PDFs shaped truth-bound UI language and no-fake-green boundary emphasis.
explanations.servitor_inference_percent: Applied bounded implementation decisions for request/result/ledger shaping and action report wiring.
explanations.owner_input_percent: Owner instruction to clean worktree allowed admission and continuation under gate law.
explanations.organs_registries_percent: Universal gate laws and script/type/chunking discipline constrained execution and reporting behavior.
